text:
The attendance of the guardian from the hearing on [date] is excused provided they have given their advocate full instructions.

The child[ren]’s solicitor shall arrange an advocates’ meeting [at [time] on [date]] / [not later than 2 working days before the next hearing] / [not later than 7 working days before the IRH] which shall be attended by the advocates who will appear at the hearing or any subsequent fact-finding or final hearing if different.

The agenda for the advocates’ meeting on [date] shall include:

agreement of a threshold document setting out what is agreed and any disputed allegations that need to be determined; and

an agreed witness template for the final hearing.

Orders

[Insert all other orders (headings may be used if they improve clarity of the order but are not mandatory)]

SCHEDULE

Recitals

The court records the following information for the purposes of the Family Advocacy Scheme (FAS):

the advocates met for pre-hearing discussions between [time] and [time];

the hearing started at [time] and ended at [time];

the court allowed 1 hour thereafter for preparation and agreement of the order between [time] and [time];

[name of advocate] is entitled to a bolt on because they are representing a client who is facing allegations that they have caused significant harm to a child which have been made or adopted by the local authority and are a live issue in proceedings;

[name of advocate] is entitled to a bolt on because they are representing a person who has difficulty in giving instructions or understanding advice;

all advocates are entitled to a bolt on because an independent expert witness was cross-examined and substantially challenged by a party at the hearing; and

the advocates’ bundle page count is [insert].

(include at any hearing where the court makes findings of fact)

[The court handed down judgment from the finding of fact hearing on [date] and made the findings in the schedule to this order.] / [The court gave an oral judgment on [date] at the finding of fact hearing and made the findings in the schedule to this order.]

[Insert (only strictly necessary recitals such as the agreed basis of an order, a concession, an issue resolved, an agreement, mechanical information, such as how an expert will be paid, by whom and what issues the expert should look at)]

Dated [date]

Case No: [insert]

metadata.title: In the Family Court		Case No: [Case number]
